text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon has a quiz coming up soon, so I
decide to bring her to the library for some
studying.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
You know, my grades aren't so bad that you need
to be here to watch me.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
On the other hand, I suppose it isn't rare to be at
the bottom of your class when you don't sit for
tests to begin with.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
But at least I show up for the important ones. See,
there's no problem.
choice_data_list: You have to take the quizzes too!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
No I don't. I understand how learning enriches
one's life, but...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
That's precisely why academics should be
recognized as a hobby.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Besides, I have better things to do than to take
tests.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe... I'll have you know, I just finished a new
concoction this morning!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Drinking it activates the brain's neurons, making
you instantly aware of every phenomenon.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I listen to her explanation of what I'm sure is just
another dangerous drug of hers... but to my
surprise, she's taken it herself.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
So, if successful, my neurons should be more than
ten times as sharp for at least half the day.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
However, I've also predicted that certain cases
may result in the occurrence of symptoms like
fatigue.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha! I know, right? My mind is sharp as a
knife!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
But, unfortunately, "sharp" seems to be the
extent of this benefit. I haven't reached my
original estimate of ten times the clarity.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Well, it did take a tremendous amount of effort
and time to make it.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Maybe it's best I don't continue this experiment for some time...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With a big sigh of resignation, Agnes Tachyon
leaves the library.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Incidentally, she earns a perfect score on her
quiz.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
However, I've also predicted that certain cases
may result in the occurrence of symptoms like
fatigue.
choice_data_list: Does your body feel any different?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Yes. I'm extremely tired right now.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
But at the same time, my head feels strangely
clear... It's a curious sensation.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I wouldn't call this experiment a perfect success,
but these results aren't bad either.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her exhausted appearance contrasts with her
tone of voice. With that, she decides to leave the
library.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Incidentally, she earns a perfect score on her
quiz.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
And so! My mind is sharp as a knife at the
moment!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Despite my subjective conclusion, I feel the effect
has improved my perception at least ten times
over!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Indeed, there's nothing better than a successful
experiment! It's exhilarating! Totally worth the
trouble!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Now to continue further testing and obtain more
data. Heh-heh-heh!
choice_data_list: What about studying for the quiz?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, whoa. When did I ever say anything about
studying?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I just followed you to the library to get a walk in
to stimulate the brain.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: And with that said, toodle-oo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon exits the library with a spring in
her step, leaving me no chance to stop her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Incidentally, I manage to have her take the quiz,
and somehow she gets a perfect score.
